title: Real Madrid’s Valverde has stitches after fight with teammate Tchouaméni
description: Fede Valverde accused the Frenchman of leaking an earlier argument as Real prepare to play Barcelona on Sunday with the title on the line
content:
Real Madrid’s Fede Valverde was taken to hospital to have stitches after a second confrontation with teammate Aurélien Tchouaméni in two days, as the club’s collapse into chaos continues.
Players held an emergency meeting and Real have opened discipl... [3333 chars]

title: Donald Trump's 'irresponsible war' slowing economic momentum, warns German minister
description: Finance Minister Lars Klingbeil blamed the US president's "irresponsible war in Iran" for harming the Germany economy.
content:
Germany's finance minister has blamed Donald Trump's "irresponsible war in Iran" for a big drop in his country's expected tax revenues.
Lars Klingbeil said the US president's actions in the region had caused a "global energy shock".
German officials ... [3362 chars]

title: FBI defends Kash Patel after report alleging he gifts custom whiskey bottles
description: Agency says FBI director ‘followed all applicable ethical guidelines’ in giving out personalized bourbon bottles
content:
The FBI said that agency director Kash Patel “followed all applicable ethical guidelines” after a report in the Atlantic alleged that he distributed customized bourbon whiskey bottles as gifts.

title: Derelict Somerset factory could be turned into Aldi and housing
description: The former Welton Bibby & Baron site in Midsomer Norton has been derelict for more than a decade.
content:
A derelict paper bag factory could be turned into a supermarket, nursing home and housing according to provisional plans.
Budget supermarket chain Aldi has submitted a pre-application to Somerset Council regarding the former Welton Bibby & Baron site... [381 chars]

title: Mother holds late daughter’s hand again as she meets transplant recipient
description: ‘My Georgie would have been so happy to know she had helped someone’, she says after emotional meeting with sepsis victim
content:
A mother has held her late daughter’s hand again at a meeting with the woman who received it in a transplant.
Jackie Kirwan, 65, said her daughter Georgie Peterson would have been “over the moon” to know her organ donation had made a difference.
